title: Change debug-level log to info for request tracing
description: The incoming request log in the middleware was set to DEBUG level, making it invisible in production. Changed to INFO to enable request tracing without adjusting log levels.
diff:
diff --git a/middleware/request_logger.py b/middleware/request_logger.py
index 7d8e9f0..a1b2c3d 100644
--- a/middleware/request_logger.py
+++ b/middleware/request_logger.py
@@ -15,7 +15,7 @@ class RequestLoggerMiddleware:
     async def __call__(self, request: Request, call_next):
         start = time.monotonic()
         method = request.method
-        logger.debug("Incoming %s %s", method, request.url.path)
+        logger.info("Incoming %s %s", method, request.url.path)
 
         response = await call_next(request)
comments: henry: This should have been info from the start. Approve.
author: irene
